title: Nova Commerce
shortDescription: A conversion-focused e-commerce platform with real-time inventory and editorial product storytelling.

sections.overview: Nova Commerce modernized an aging storefront into a fast, conversion-oriented shopping experience.
sections.problem: The previous store had slow product pages, inconsistent stock data, and fragile third-party scripts.
sections.solution: I designed a modular frontend, rebuilt API integrations, and introduced queue-based sync jobs for inventory.
architecture: SPA storefront connected to BFF API
Stripe checkout webhooks update order state
Redis cache for product and search responses
Nightly ETL sync to warehouse analytics
results: Support tickets about stock issues dropped by 63%

title: Pulse Analytics
shortDescription: Operational dashboard for product, sales, and customer data with role-based views.

sections.overview: Pulse gives teams a shared view of business health with fast drill-down interactions.
sections.problem: Teams relied on static spreadsheets and weekly updates, causing slow decision cycles.
sections.solution: I built reusable visualization modules and introduced a design system for data-dense interfaces.
architecture: Client app consumes aggregated metrics endpoint
Event stream ingested into time-series DB
results: Decision cycle reduced from weekly to daily
Onboarding time for analysts cut in half
Leadership adopted dashboard as source of truth

title: Helios CMS
shortDescription: Headless CMS implementation with multi-site publishing and content governance.

sections.overview: Helios brought fragmented content operations into one structured and scalable platform.
sections.problem: Editors managed content across disconnected tools without approval workflows.
sections.solution: I designed schema-driven APIs and a robust publish pipeline with role controls and revision history.
results: Security review passed on first iteration

title: Harbor Bookings
shortDescription: Full-stack booking platform with calendar sync and automated confirmations.

sections.overview: Harbor replaced a manual reservation process with a reliable self-service system.
sections.problem: Phone bookings and spreadsheet tracking caused double-bookings and delayed confirmations.
sections.solution: I built an availability engine, calendar sync workers, and a polished booking frontend.
architecture: Public booking UI calls reservation API
Calendar sync workers process async jobs
results: Positive feedback on booking UX increased significantly

title: Atlas Ops
shortDescription: Internal operations suite for fulfillment and logistics teams.

sections.overview: Atlas provides unified workflows for warehouse throughput and incident response.
sections.problem: Legacy tooling had fragmented status updates and lacked dependable APIs.
sections.solution: I created a service layer with queue-backed jobs, observability hooks, and resilient endpoints.
results: Ops team adopted real-time dashboard daily
Weekly status reporting became fully automated

title: Lumen Showcase
shortDescription: Marketing website system with reusable blocks and A/B test hooks.

sections.overview: Lumen is a modular marketing platform for rapid campaign launches.
sections.problem: Campaign landing pages were hard-coded and expensive to update.
sections.solution: I introduced a block-based approach with consistent design tokens and content controls.
architecture: Static frontend reads CMS JSON payloads
Analytics collector forwards events to BI
results: Design consistency improved across all pages
